data.name: Options_HideChat_Description
data.value: 當挿件處於啓動状態時隱藏遊戲内聊天視窗。

data.name: Options_EnableCensorshipHighlight_Description
data.value: Set Message Highlight on Censorship Words

data.name: Options_HideDuringCutscenes_Name
data.value: 播放過場動畫時隱藏聊天視窗

data.name: Options_NativeItemTooltips_Description
data.value: 當滑鼠懸停在 {0} 中的道具時，顯示遊戲中的道具幇助。

data.name: Options_SidebarTabView_Name
data.value: 在側邊欄中顯示標籤頁

data.name: Options_SidebarTabView_Description
data.value: 在 {0} 中顯示標籤頁作為側邊欄，而不是頂部。

data.name: Options_PrettierTimestamps_Description
data.value: 以更現代化的樣式顯示消息。

data.name: Options_ShowNoviceNetwork_Name
data.value: 顯示新人頻道加入按鈕

data.name: Options_ShowNoviceNetwork_Description
data.value: 以指導者身分登入時，在設定按鈕旁邊顯示新人頻道加入按鈕。

data.name: Options_ShowHideButton_Description
data.value: Show a hide button next to the settings button. The chat window can be returned by pressing return or slash to focus it.

data.name: Options_CanResize_Name
data.value: 允許調整聊天窗口大小

data.name: Options_Tabs_InactivityBehaviour
data.value: Unhide the chat window on activity

data.name: UnreadMode_Unseen_Tooltip
data.value: 僅顯示未看的訊息的未讀數。

data.name: Options_Font_Description
data.value: 字型將用於 {0} 顯示非日文文字。

data.name: Options_Font_Warning
data.value: 使用某些系統字型可能會使君の遊戲崩潰。 已經警告汝了。

data.name: Options_JapaneseFont_Description
data.value: 字型將用於 {0} 顯示日文文字。

data.name: Options_Italic_Description
data.value: If enabled, uses the italic font in {0}, else it will use the ingame italic font.

data.name: Options_SymbolsFontSize_Description
data.value: 用於遊戲符號的字型大小

data.name: Options_HideWhenNotLoggedIn_Description
data.value: 當汝沒有登入到角色時隱藏 {0}。

data.name: Options_About_Opening
data.value: {0} 是一個完全重新建立遊戲内聊天並使其變得更好的專案。 繁體中文是為了不開補全功能也能與其他玩家正常顯示溝通所翻譯及修改。

data.name: Options_CommandHelpSide_Name
data.value: 命令幫助方向 (無 = 關閉)

data.name: Options_HideWhenUiHidden_Name
data.value: 當遊戲介面隱藏時隱藏

data.name: Options_HideWhenUiHidden_Description
data.value: 當遊戲介面隱藏時隱藏 {0} 。

data.name: Options_HideWhenInactive_Description
data.value: Hide the chat after a configurable period of inactivity. The current tab and any other tabs with the setting enabled are considered for activity.

data.name: Options_InactivityHideTimeout_Description
data.value: How long to wait (in seconds) before considering the chat log inactive.

data.name: Options_InactivityHideActiveDuringBattle_Description
data.value: When disabled, the chat log will stay active during battle.

data.name: Options_InactivityHideChannels_Description
data.value: Which chat channels should be considered for activity. Other channels will not restore the chat regardless of which tab they occur in.

data.name: KeybindMode_Flexible_Tooltip
data.value: 即使其他按鍵被按下時，也能使用鍵盤快捷鍵。

data.name: KeybindMode_Strict_Tooltip
data.value: 僅當沒有按鍵被按下時，才能使用鍵盤快捷鍵。

data.name: Options_DatabaseBattleMessages_Name
data.value: 將戰鬥訊息儲存到資料庫

data.name: Options_DatabaseBattleMessages_Description
data.value: 如果將戰鬥訊息儲存到資料庫中，資料庫的大小將會更快増長，儲存設定時會出現明顯的遲鈍。 建議禁用此功能。

data.name: Options_LoadPreviousSession_Name
data.value: 登入時顯示之前的聊天會話

data.name: Options_LoadPreviousSession_Description
data.value: 登入後，將上次登出時的訊息填充聊天内容。

data.name: Options_FilterIncludePreviousSessions_Name
data.value: 在填充標籤頁時包括以前的會話

data.name: Options_FilterIncludePreviousSessions_Description
data.value: 填充標籤頁時包括遊戲啓動前的資訊。儲存設定時標籤頁會被填充。

data.name: Options_Database_Advanced_Warning
data.value: 不要點選這些按鈕，除非您知道自己在做什麼。

data.name: Options_HideSameTimestamps_Description
data.value: 當以前的訊息有相同的時間戳時，隱藏時間戳。

data.name: Options_ShowPopOutTitleBar_Name
data.value: 顯示彈出標籤頁標題欄

data.name: Options_Tabs_IndependentOpacity
data.value: 使用與主視窗不同的不透明度

data.name: Options_Tabs_IndependentHide
data.value: Use different hide condition than main window

data.name: Options_SortAutoTranslate_Description
data.value: 如果啓用此選項，定型文列表將按字母順序排序。

data.name: Options_WebinterfaceEnable_Description
data.value: Enables the webinterface that can be accessed with a browser.

data.name: Options_WebinterfaceAutoStart_Description
data.value: Webinterface will start alongside the plugin automatically

data.name: Webinterface_PasswordReset_Tooltip
data.value: Reset your password and invalidate all session tokens.

data.name: Options_ExtraGlyphs_Description
data.value: 啓用下面的複選框，可以將額外的字形新増到 {0} 的全域性字型中。這可能需要増加Dalamud字型圖集的大小。

data.name: Context_SearchRecipes
data.value: 檢視它能用來製作什麼道具

data.name: Options_CollapseDuplicateMessages_Description
data.value: 摺疊連續重複的訊息並顯示摺疊數量。

data.name: Options_CollapseDuplicateMsgUniqueLink_Description
data.value: Don't collapse messages if they link to different things with the same text.

data.name: Context_AdventurerPlateError
data.value: 當前無法查看冒險者銘牌

data.name: Options_TooltipOffset_Desc
data.value: 如果提示窗口被截斷, 請啟動本項

data.name: Context_CopyContentSuccess
data.value: 已複製消息內容至剪貼板

data.name: PartyInvite_NoId
data.value: Unable to find ID for this message, please try another one.

data.name: Context_OpenInBrowserError
data.value: 在瀏覽器中開啟連結失敗，請提交此 BUG 相關的資訊

data.name: Context_URLWarning
data.value: 僅開啟受信任網站的連結

data.name: Options_OverrideStyle_Name_Desc
data.value: 用另一種 Dalamud 樣式覆蓋目前選中的樣式

data.name: Options_ClearDatabase_Success
data.value: 已成功清除聊天數據庫

data.name: Options_ClearDatabase_Tooltip
data.value: 移除所有消息歷史紀錄。改選想無法還原。請同時按住 Ctrl+Shift 鍵後點擊。

data.name: Options_Database_Metadata_CopyConfigPath
data.value: 點擊複製數據庫目錄路徑

data.name: Options_Database_Metadata_CopyConfigPathNotification
data.value: 已複製數據庫目錄路徑至剪貼板

data.name: Options_OverrideStyle_NotAvailable
data.value: 無可用的 Dalamud 樣式

data.name: Options_MaxLinesToShow_Name
data.value: 在聊天窗口中可顯示聊天日誌的最大數量

data.name: Options_MaxLinesToShow_Description
data.value: 限制在聊天窗口種現實的日誌行數，性能可能會因此略有提高。

data.name: Options_WebinterfaceMaxLinesToSend_Name
data.value: Log line limit for the webinterface

data.name: Options_WebinterfaceMaxLinesToSend_Description
data.value: Limits the amount of log lines to show in the webinterface. This will improve loading performance.

data.name: LoadMessages_Error
data.value: 載入聊天日誌時發生錯誤，清查勘查間日誌已獲得更多新系已報告此問題。

data.name: Options_Database_Old_Delete_Tooltip
data.value: 從此盤商刪除數據庫。改選想無法恢復！請同時按住 Ctrl+Shift 鍵後點擊。

data.name: Options_Database_Old_Delete_Error
data.value: 無法善書就數據庫，從 /xllog 中獲取更多信息。

data.name: Options_Tabs_SenderMessages
data.value: Show all messages sent by target

data.name: Options_AdjustPosition_Warning
data.value: 注意：次更改將立即適用且無法取消！

data.name: Options_KeepInputFocus_Description
data.value: 保持輸入焦點，即使進入戰鬥或執行其他操作。

data.name: Options_ShowEmotes_Desc
data.value: 用表情替換單詞，目前支持 BetterTTV。

data.name: Options_Preview_Description
data.value: 顯示特殊參數預覽，如表情或 <item>。

data.name: Options_PreviewOnlyIf_Description
data.value: 只顯示包含特殊參數的文本。

data.name: Options_PreviewMinimum_Description
data.value: 僅當文字長度大於或等於時才顯示。

data.name: Options_PrintChangelog_Description
data.value: 在變更後想聊天窗發送變更紀錄。

data.name: DbViewer_SearcHint
data.value: 建議發送者或內容搜索

data.name: Chat_SendTell_Error
data.value: An error occured while sending this tell message

data.name: Webinterface_Stop_Failed
data.value: Webinterface failed to stop. Check /xllog for more information.

data.name: Webinterface_Start_Failed
data.value: Webinterface failed to start. Check /xllog for more information.

data.name: Webinterface_Option_Port_Description
data.value: The port this webinterface will be running on.

data.name: Options_Webinterface_Warning_Header
data.value: After checking 'Enabled' and clicking 'Start' this will load up Chat2's built-in web interface, which will allow devices on your network to access in-game chat. This feature may be used to allow a phone or another computer to see Chat2 activity, switch channels, and send messages as though you were typing in FFXIV itself.

data.name: Options_Webinterface_Warning_Reason
data.value: For reasons of account security, this feature is not intended for use outside of your local network, you have been warned!

data.name: Options_Webinterface_DoNot_Share
data.value: - Share your authentication code with anyone else

data.name: Options_Webinterface_DoNot_Multibox
data.value: - Expect multi-boxing to work with this (only first client works)

data.name: Options_Webinterface_Warning_Support
data.value: No support will be provided if any of the 'Do Not' clauses aren't respected and adhered to appropriately.

data.name: Options_Webinterface_Note
data.value: Note: This will require at least a semi-modern browser in order to function correctly.

data.name: Options_Help_SenderMessages
data.value: This disables the channel selection and shows all messages coming from the target.

data.name: Database_Migration_Error_Desc
data.value: Database migration has failed, a new database will be created. Your old database can still be recovered, please contact the plugin author for help.

data.name: Folder_Export_Location_Tooltip
data.value: Pick a folder location for export.

data.name: Export_Txt_Tooltip
data.value: Export the message history to a text file.

data.name: Export_Json_Tooltip
data.value: Export the message history to a json file.
